framework.name: OIDC-A: OpenID Connect extension for agent identity
framework.description: Nagabhushanaradhya proposes OIDC-A, an OIDC extension specifically for agent identity — treating agents as first-class identity subjects rather than repurposed human credentials. Referenced but not deeply analyzed in this paper.
framework.raw_quote: Nagabhushanaradhya proposes OIDC-A, an OpenID Connect extension for agent identity

source.title: [PDF] Structural Equivalence Between Memory Consistency Models ... - arXiv
